personal.preferred_title: Senior AI Engineer | GenAI & Data Engineering Specialist
personal.address: Murphy, TX (Plano area) / 424 Oriole Dr., Murphy, TX 75094
personal.work_authorization: Authorized to work in the U.S. without sponsorship now or in the future

summary: Senior AI Engineer with over 20 years of expertise in designing and delivering data engineering solutions, AI-driven pipelines, and GenAI applications for enterprise environments. Proficient in building LLM models, implementing RAG and vector search, and optimizing real-time inference services with a strong focus on security controls and DevOps practices. Skilled in data and AI engineering, API design, and cloud platforms like AWS and Azure, ensuring scalable and governed solutions. Experienced in MLOps and LLMOps to drive operational efficiency and reliability. Eager to contribute to Deloitte’s Human Capital team by leveraging my technical depth to build innovative AI solutions for HR products.

flagship_projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
flagship_projects.description: Developed an end-to-end agentic pipeline using Python and GenAI models like Claude and Grok (xAI), focusing on RAG and vector search with FAISS embeddings for semantic duplicate detection across 100+ job postings. Implemented multi-step workflows for job scoring, resume tailoring, and quality gating, ensuring governed outputs. Integrated LLM models for real-time inference and application tracking, aligning with AI engineering best practices.
highlights: Designed and built 10-step agentic orchestration pipeline (intake → score → tailor → generate → render → quality gate → track)
Implemented semantic duplicate detection using FAISS vector embeddings and sentence-transformers
Integrated Grok-3 LLM API for job scoring, resume tailoring, and cover letter generation
Built quality gate with automated pattern detection to prevent bad output from reaching submission
Used Claude Code and MCP servers for AI-accelerated development throughout

flagship_projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
flagship_projects.description: Engineered an AI-driven forecasting engine using Python and PySpark, integrating GenAI and data engineering to replace manual processes, cutting cycles by 90%. Developed Prophet and scikit-learn models for real-time inference, predicting capacity bottlenecks 6 months ahead. Built a Streamlit dashboard for interactive insights, aligning with MLOps practices for operational efficiency.
highlights: Replaced manual forecasting — cut cycles by 90%
Prophet + scikit-learn models predicting bottlenecks 6 months ahead
Interactive Streamlit dashboard for real-time capacity insights

flagship_projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
flagship_projects.description: Designed a serverless data platform on AWS using S3, Glue, Athena, and Bedrock, focusing on data engineering and GenAI integration with Claude 3 Sonnet for Text-to-SQL agents. Optimized ETL pipelines with Parquet compression to solve small file issues, ensuring scalability for enterprise use. Applied security controls and DevOps practices to maintain governance and performance.

flagship_projects.name: FAST Project
flagship_projects.description: Conducted data mining of user performance metrics using Dynatrace to optimize critical systems, supporting data engineering efforts for real-time insights. Delivered actionable recommendations to enhance system efficiency.
